queries.question: For each bank training session, provide the corresponding value of topics.
queries.sql: select bank_training.training_id , topics.value from Bank_Training_Topics join Topics on Bank_Training_Topics.topic_id = Topics.id join Bank_Training on Bank_Training_Topics.bank_training_id = Bank_Training.training_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?training_id ?value WHERE {
  ?bank_training_topics a :Bank_Training_Topics .
  ?topics a :Topics .
  ?bank_training_topics p:hasTopics ?topics .
  ?bank_training a :Bank_Training .
  ?bank_training_topics p:hasBank_Training ?bank_training .
  ?bank_training p:training_id ?training_id .
  ?topics p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: What value of topics is common across all bank training sessions?
queries.sql: SELECT Topics.value  from Bank_Training_Topics join Topics on Bank_Training_Topics.topic_id = Topics.id join Bank_Training on Bank_Training_Topics.bank_training_id = Bank_Training.training_id   GROUP BY Bank_Training_Topics.topic_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Training_Topics.bank_training_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Training)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What value of topics is associated with each bank training?
